'''Kram Balut''' was a [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]]. One of Balut's contacts was [[Jah-kii Vaargaz]] who was wanted by [[Republic Security Force/Legends|Republic Security Force]]; her bounty was later claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

{{Char-stub}}
